# hiloop skills

> Open-source Agent Skills that teach AI agents to operate hiloop — isolated, forkable agent sandboxes
> with tree-native observability. The skills drive hiloop through the `hiloop` CLI and follow the open
> Agent Skills standard, so they work across harnesses.

## Start here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): whole-product orientation — the interface, the always-in-order rules, the canonical end-to-end loop.

## Skills

- [authenticating](skills/authenticating/SKILL.md): sign in with hiloop login (default) or HILOOP_API_KEY (headless/CI), whoami, org-vs-tenant scope, key management.
- [creating-sandboxes](skills/creating-sandboxes/SKILL.md): hiloop sandbox create / poll-ready / delete; projects, bring-your-own images, resources, capabilities, capture.
- [running-commands-in-a-sandbox](skills/running-commands-in-a-sandbox/SKILL.md): quick `hiloop sandbox exec`, interactive `start` + `stream` (SSE), steer with `send-input` (stdin/signals) + `kill`, read exit code, move files via artifacts.
- [snapshotting-and-forking](skills/snapshotting-and-forking/SKILL.md): hiloop sandbox snapshot / restore / fork into divergent branches identified by lineage_path.
- [managing-secrets](skills/managing-secrets/SKILL.md): hiloop secret set/list/rotate/revoke + hiloop run --secret; a write-only credential a sandbox uses but never sees (the broker).
- [querying-observability-trees](skills/querying-observability-trees/SKILL.md): capture a run with hiloop run, query telemetry with read-only SQL over the events table, lineage_path scoping, telemetry tail, branch-diff.
- [annotating-runs](skills/annotating-runs/SKILL.md): hiloop annotation-schema + annotate / annotate-range; structured outcome/score judgments on a run you can filter on.

## Reference

- [events SQL reference](skills/querying-observability-trees/references/events-sql.md): the read-only SQL query surface — the events table columns, query rules, example SELECTs.

## More

- hiloop docs: https://docs.hiloop.ai
- hiloop docs machine index: https://docs.hiloop.ai/llms.txt
